rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing subcomponents or correcting references
Ensure subcomponent references match exactly with the AADL model
Do not add subcomponents that are not referenced in the AADL model
generic_rules: Preserve existing architecture when repairing validator diagnostics
Only add or modify elements that are directly referenced in the diagnostic
Do not introduce new subcomponents or connections without explicit references
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Subcomponent references must match exactly with the AADL model
Use the correct syntax for subcomponent declarations in AADL
anti_patterns: Do not add subcomponents that are not referenced in the diagnostic
Do not modify or add elements that are not directly related to the diagnostic
